title: Kuzon's Stream Server
description: this modpack is to be used for a vanilla experience with a few changes to help those who don’t like using the crafting book Mojang implemented (moved from curseforge due to the removal of modmenu and sodium)
body:
this modpack is to be used for a vanilla experience with a few changes to help those who don’t like using the crafting book Mojang implemented (moved from curseforge due to the removal of modmenu and sodium)

polylib is hosted at https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib
